SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-04-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-04-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSH FREDRICKS. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF ROY ERIC STRONG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MIMI LI IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-04-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STRONG, ROY ERIC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LI, MIMI $900.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $965.00, JUDGMENT FOR THE PLAINTIFF VERSUS DEFENDANT FOR $900.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT LI, MIMI
